prompt: Create a vibrant anime-style full-body vertical illustration of one young female fantasy heroine standing in a lush green onion field under a brilliant summer sky. The character is the main subject, viewed from a low angle, centered slightly right, with dynamic wind blowing her very long black hair with violet-purple gradients dramatically to the left. Her face is intentionally covered by a soft-edged square blur, while the rest of the image remains crisp and highly detailed. She wears an elegant white blouse with wide sleeves, a teal-green sleeveless outer robe/cape, a dark teal pleated skirt, a layered white overskirt, a navy waist sash, thigh-high white stockings, and ornate botanical accessories. Include exactly 8 visible outfit/accessory elements: 1 white blouse, 1 teal outer robe, 1 dark teal pleated skirt, 1 layered white overskirt, 1 navy waist sash, 1 floral chest brooch, 1 tassel-and-ring belt ornament, and 1 pair of white thigh-high stockings. Her right arm is raised high, proudly holding exactly 1 large bunch of fresh green onions with long green leaves and white stalks; her left hand hangs relaxed near her side. The setting is a refreshing harvest scene with neat rows of green onions filling the foreground and midground, distant blue-green mountains on both sides, and a vivid cobalt-blue sky with fluffy white clouds. Add scattered windblown green onion leaves and small leaf fragments across the sky for motion and freshness. Use high-detail Japanese anime illustration style, luminous clean colors, crisp linework, painterly highlights, flowing fabric, sparkling sunlight, and a heroic yet refreshing harvest atmosphere. Aspect ratio 3:4, no text, no watermark, no extra characters.
